title: Inventory Plus
description: Vanilla-friendly inventory quality-of-life: auto-restock, auto tool switch, sorting, move-matching, locked slots, and column cycling. Client-side — works on any server.
body:
## Inventory Plus

Vanilla-faithful, friction-free inventory quality-of-life. Every feature is player-controlled, matches the vanilla look, and stays out of your way. Client-side — install it and join any server, vanilla or modded.

## Features

- **Auto-Restock** — when your held stack runs out, or a tool or armor piece breaks, automatically refill it from your inventory. Optional "restock before it breaks" swaps in a fresh piece before the current one shatters.
- **Auto Tool Switch** — hit a block and the right tool swaps into your hand automatically. Optionally switch to a weapon when you attack a mob (with a preferred-weapon setting), then return to whatever you were holding. Hold sneak to suppress.
- **Sort** — tidy any container or your inventory with a button or a keybind.
- **Move Matching** — move every matching item between your inventory and a container in one click.
- **Locked Slots** — lock slots so sorting and quick-move leave them untouched.
- **Column Cycler** — turn a vertical column of inventory slots into a cycle you rotate through a hotbar slot, with a slick mini-hotbar HUD — more reach without cluttering your screen.

## Pockets & equipment slots?

Server-persistent **pockets** above your hotbar and extra **equipment slots** live in **[Inventory Plus Plus](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-plus-plus)**, the server-cooperative companion mod.

## Dependencies

- **MenuKit** — UI library (required)
- **Keybindery** — in-config keybind tab + multi-key chord bindings (required)
